title: heleniastrum
intro: Heleniastrum, also known as Helianthus annuus, is a type of flowering plant commonly referred to as the common sunflower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as inflammation and ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, improving heart health, and acting as an antioxidant. Heleniastrum is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in various forms to promote overall well-being.
